_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Enterprise architecture involves analysing how to achieve an organisation's objectives by designing and aligning its IT applications and technologies. Business architecture involves defining the business strategy, governance and most important processes of the organisation.
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-002 (DG, cosine: 0.525), DA-S-001 (DA, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.572). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, enterprise]. DDaT-only terms [achieve, aligning, analysing, applications, business, defining] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.865, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 34-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.3%). "Enterprise architecture involves analysing how to achieve an organisation's obje" and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.547 ≈ STS 0.572 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture, enterprise] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [architecture, enterprise]. DDaT-only: [achieve, aligning, analysing, applications, business, defining]. WIDAI-only: [data, design, document, domain, integration, lifecycle].
